title: For a fight-focused 30-35 person guild, here's the current picture across Meta and Great tiers. The key split is **boon-strip DPS** (strips enemy Stability so your burst lands) vs. **pure burst DPS** (converts the strips into downs). Per the comp playbook principle from Veridian, you want roughly a 2:1 boon-strip to pure-burst ratio.

turns.agentText:
For a fight-focused 30-35 person guild, here's the current picture across Meta and Great tiers. The key split is **boon-strip DPS** (strips enemy Stability so your burst lands) vs. **pure burst DPS** (converts the strips into downs). Per the comp playbook principle from Veridian, you want roughly a 2:1 boon-strip to pure-burst ratio.

{{figure}}

---

### How to think about your DPS slots

At 30–35 players you'll have roughly **5–7 subgroups**. After slotting your supports (Firebrands, Druid, Scrappers), you're filling maybe **15–20 DPS slots**. Here's how to split them:

#### 🔴 Boon-Strip DPS — fill these first
These builds strip the enemy's Stability so your spike kills instead of bouncing off:

| Build | Source | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| **Core Necromancer** | [gw2mists.com](https://gw2mists.com/en/builds/necromancer/power-necro) | Meta · 81% popularity · highest strip value + burst in one build |
| **DPS Untamed** | [MetaBattle](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) | Great · spear + hammer strip stacks; pairs well with Necro wells |
| **Spellbreaker (Spear DPS)** | [MetaBattle](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) | Great · [[skill:Winds of Disenchantment]] is a massive AoE strip + [[item:Sigil of Nullification]] |

#### 🟡 Pure Burst DPS — fill remaining slots
Once strips are covered, these are your kill-power:

| Build | Source | Range | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Evoker (Spear Backline)** | [gw2mists.com](https://gw2mists.com/en/builds/elementalist/dps-evoker) | Ranged | Meta · 83.5% popularity · highest burst ceiling; hardest to play |
| **Power Reaper** | [MetaBattle](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) | Melee | Meta · reliable melee spike |
| **Power Dragonhunter** | [MetaBattle](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) | Melee | Great · coordinated bomb partner; strong with Firebrand subgroups |
| **DPS Tempest** | [MetaBattle](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) | Ranged | Great · Staff/[[skill:Overload Air]]; forgiving entry point for newer players |
| **DPS Amalgam** | [MetaBattle](https://metabattle.com/wiki/WvW) | Melee | Great · new spec (June '26 patch); dual hammer melee burst |

---

### Quick take for your guild
For a **fight-focused** 30–35 guild, **Core Necro is your most important DPS recruit** — it's doing both jobs at once. Stack 4–6 of them, pair with 2–3 Untamed or Spellbreakers for supplemental strip, then fill the rest with Evokers (ranged backline) and Reapers/Dragonhunters (melee bomb). Tempest is a great "accessible" ranged pick for members still gearing up.

Want me to sketch a full comp with supports included for your squad size?

builds.note: Meta — top ranged burst, Familiar/Etching mechanic; Marauder gear
Meta — boon strip AND burst via Wells; near-mandatory for fights
Meta — melee power DPS, strong spike damage
Great — boon strip focus, excellent strip uptime; Dragon's/Marauder
Great — boon strip (Winds of Disenchantment) + Sigil of Nullification
Great — coordinated spike, melee pressure; Dragon's/Marauder
Great — ranged AoE via Overload Air; Marauder gear; easy to play
Great — new spec, melee burst; Marauder/Dragon's gear
